languages.text: "Я никогда не оставлю в беде слуг Империума". {n}Космодесантник произносит эти слова спокойно, почти равнодушно.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Я никогда не оставлю в беде слуг Империума". {n}Космодесантник произносит эти слова спокойно, почти равнодушно.{/n}

languages.text: "I will never abandon servants of the Imperium in need." {n}The Astartes says these words calmly, almost indifferently.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Я никогда не оставлю в беде слуг Империума". {n}Космодесантник произносит эти слова спокойно, почти равнодушно.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "I will never abandon servants of the Imperium in need." {n}The Astartes says these words calmly, almost indifferently.{/n}
"I will never abandon servants of the Imperium in need." {n}The Astartes says these words calmly, almost indifferently.{/n}
"I will never abandon servants of the Imperium in need." {n}The Astartes says these words calmly, almost indifferently.{/n}

languages.text: “我绝不会抛弃需要帮助的帝国仆从。”{n}阿斯塔特平静地说出这句话，语气甚至近乎淡漠。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I will never abandon servants of the Imperium in need." {n}The Astartes says these words calmly, almost indifferently.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “我绝不会抛弃需要帮助的帝国仆从。”{n}阿斯塔特平静地说出这句话，语气甚至近乎淡漠。{/n}

languages.text: «Nunca abandonaré a un sirviente del Imperium que necesite ayuda». {n}El tono del Astartes es tranquilo, casi indiferente.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I will never abandon servants of the Imperium in need." {n}The Astartes says these words calmly, almost indifferently.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Nunca abandonaré a un sirviente del Imperium que necesite ayuda». {n}El tono del Astartes es tranquilo, casi indiferente.{/n}

languages.text: « Je n'abandonnerai jamais des serviteurs de l'Imperium dans le besoin. » {n}Le guerrier de l'Astartes prononce ces paroles calmement, presque avec indifférence.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I will never abandon servants of the Imperium in need." {n}The Astartes says these words calmly, almost indifferently.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Je n'abandonnerai jamais des serviteurs de l'Imperium dans le besoin. » {n}Le guerrier de l'Astartes prononce ces paroles calmement, presque avec indifférence.{/n}

languages.text: "İmparatorluk'un ihtiyaç hâlindeki hizmetkârlarını asla yüzüstü bırakmam." {n}Astartes; bu sözleri sakince, neredeyse kayıtsızca söylüyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I will never abandon servants of the Imperium in need." {n}The Astartes says these words calmly, almost indifferently.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "İmparatorluk'un ihtiyaç hâlindeki hizmetkârlarını asla yüzüstü bırakmam." {n}Astartes; bu sözleri sakince, neredeyse kayıtsızca söylüyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Ich werde niemals in Not geratene Diener des Imperiums im Stich lassen." {n}Der Astartes sagt dies ruhig, beinahe teilnahmslos.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I will never abandon servants of the Imperium in need." {n}The Astartes says these words calmly, almost indifferently.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Ich werde niemals in Not geratene Diener des Imperiums im Stich lassen." {n}Der Astartes sagt dies ruhig, beinahe teilnahmslos.{/n}

languages.text: 「困っている帝国の臣民を、私は決して見捨てない」{n}アスターテスは、この言葉を冷静に、まるで無関心そうに言う.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I will never abandon servants of the Imperium in need." {n}The Astartes says these words calmly, almost indifferently.{/n}
